entry.title: New: CR 25-42 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 47, CD1 (2025), to authorize the Mayor to enter into an intergovernmental agreement with the State of Hawaiʻi, Department of Business, Economic Development and Tourism, and Hawai‘i counties for the Hawaiʻi Creative Economy Collaborative.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
